title: Cobblemon: Dyeable Mareep
description: A Datapack that lets you dye Mareep's Wool and adds a custom Shiny to help tell the difference easier.
body:
Dyeable mareep allows you to use any Dye to change the color of Mareep's Wool.
Adds a Custom Shiny Mareep to help tell apart from Pink Dyed Wool.

Remember to Install this pack in both your World Datapack Folder, and Resouce Pack Folder.


![New Shiny Mareep Compared to Pink Dyed Mareep.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3321c8ff579ace3b3478bdc96152d67c1fc7d3ba_0.webp)
